user_request: Crea un juego de acción y plataformas para Amstrad CPC 6128, inspirado en Ghosts 'n Goblins, con dificultad alta, enemigos por oleadas y control preciso
orchestrator: game_concept="Action-platformer game for Amstrad CPC 6128 inspired by Ghosts 'n Goblins, featuring high difficulty, wave-based enemy spawns, and precise controls. The player navigates through hazardous levels filled with traps and enemies, aiming to reach the end while surviving relentless attacks." genre_hint='action_platformer_run_and_gun' reference_games=["Ghosts 'n Goblins", 'Rick Dangerous', 'Gryzor (Contra)'] player_fantasy='Become a lone knight battling through a nightmarish world, overcoming brutal challenges with skillful movement and precise attacks.
